title: WTHIT Plugins
body:
More features for WTHIT! Re-implementing old waila addons for WTHIT Adds: - Baby growth time - Adult breed cooldown - Block hardness - Shift to show mod authors - Entity armor points - Animal breed item indicator (shows up when you hold a valid item and you’re pointing at an animal) Original mods: - [WAWLA](https://github.com/Darkhax-Minecraft/WAWLA)
- [Waila Harvestability](https://github.com/squeek502/WailaHarvestability)
- [Waila Features](https://github.com/way2muchnoise/WAILA-features)
- [Waila Plugins](https://github.com/tterrag1098/WAILAPlugins).
